message.content:
- BreatheEz is an app/website for individuals struggling with breathing-related issues.
- It utilizes computer vision, AR/VR, and pose estimation algorithms to provide real-time feedback and guidance.
- Many people cannot access expert supervision, leading to ineffective practice and continued issues.
- BreatheEz aims to solve this by providing real-time guidance to users, making the process more efficient and accessible regardless of location.
